description: Crafted for the urban style maven, this wallet from fastrack is a must have for those who love organising their wallet space. Dimensions : 25 cm x 16 cm Crafted from Leatherette and has a three fold with a press button closure One main compartment One small zippered compartment with two insert pockets Three card holders and one id card pocket One mirror and a pen holder on the inside of the flap Metal studs on the top Brand name on the top and inside and brand logo on the inside Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
